testcase.name: processMessage_whenAutoReplyDisabled_returnsNull

testcase.name: processMessage_with人工Keyword_transfersToHuman
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T06:59:05.908+08:00 INFO 23938 --- [minimall] [ main] c.m.service.CustomerServiceService : Message null transferred to human handler: human-1778540345908

testcase.name: processMessage_with客服Keyword_transfersToHuman
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T06:59:05.913+08:00 INFO 23938 --- [minimall] [ main] c.m.service.CustomerServiceService : Message null transferred to human handler: human-1778540345913

testcase.name: processMessage_withTransferKeyword_setsTransferredStatus
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T06:59:05.917+08:00 INFO 23938 --- [minimall] [ main] c.m.service.CustomerServiceService : Message null transferred to human handler: human-1778540345917
